G

getAllValues() - Method in class cli.FlagRule
Retrieves all values currently associated with this flag rule.
getFirstFreeArgument() - Method in class cli.CommandFlagParser
Retrieves the first stand-alone argument from the value set.
getFlagName() - Method in class cli.FlagRule
Retrieves the name of this flag.
getFlagRule(String) - Method in class cli.CommandFlagParser
Retrieves a flag rule if registered.
getFlagType() - Method in class cli.FlagRule
Retrieves the type of this flag.
getFreeArgumentByIndex(int) - Method in class cli.CommandFlagParser
Retrieves the free-standing argument from a specific position in the value set.
getFreeArgumentCount() - Method in class cli.CommandFlagParser
Returns the count of free-standing arguments not associated with any registered flags.
getRule(String) - Method in class cli.FlagRegistry
Retrieves a rule by name.
getRuleSize() - Method in class cli.FlagRegistry
Returns the number of registered flag rules.
getSize() - Method in class cli.FlagRule
Returns the number of values stored within this flag.
getTokens() - Method in class cli.LexicalCommandProcessor
Provides the normalised tokens for further processing.
getValue(int) - Method in class cli.FlagRule
Returns a value from the specified position in the list.
getValueByFlag(String) - Method in class cli.CommandFlagParser
Retrieves the value of the specified flag if present.
getValueByFlag(String, int) - Method in class cli.CommandFlagParser
Retrieves the value of the specified flag by its index in the value set.
getValueLength(String) - Method in class cli.CommandFlagParser
Returns the size of the value set which the specified flag is associated with.
